spirit.title: The spirit of Tchouk'Leu
spirit.description: Tchouk'Leu is a tchoukball club based in Saint-Leu on the island of Réunion. Inspired by the energy of the ocean and the spirit of fair play, the club brings together players passionate about teamwork and sport.

island.title: Our island
island.quote: "Rooted in Saint-Leu, Tchouk'Leu reflects the energy of the island of Réunion — the ocean, the wind and freedom of movement."

join.title: Want to try tchoukball?
join.description: Contact our team and discover a dynamic, friendly and respectful sport.

training.title: Training
training.subtitle: Join us for dynamic and friendly sessions

club.heroSubtitle: Since 2014, Tchouk'Leu has been the leading tchoukball club in Réunion, combining sporting passion and island spirit.
club.historyP1: Tchouk'Leu was born in 2014 from the passion of a group of tchoukball enthusiasts — a sport still little known in Réunion at the time. Inspired by the values of fair play and respect, they decided to found a club in Saint-Leu.
club.historyP2: Over the years, the club has grown and developed, attracting players of all levels and ages. Today, Tchouk'Leu has several dozen licensed members and actively participates in regional and inter-regional competitions.
club.historyP3: Our club stands out for its friendly atmosphere, its commitment to youth development, and its deep attachment to sporting and human values.
club.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide our club every day
club.fairPlayDesc: Respect for the rules and opponents at the heart of our practice
club.teamSpiritDesc: Cohesion and mutual support are our greatest strengths
club.performanceDesc: Progress together while keeping the joy of the game
club.wofEmpty: No Wall of Fame profiles yet.

whiteSharks.description: The White Sharks are a selection team bringing together the best young players from Réunion Island, gathering talent from several clubs across the island to represent the territory at major sporting events.
whiteSharks.palmaresEmpty: The White Sharks' record will be added soon.
